commands.name: current-desktop
commands.title: Current Desktop
commands.description: Show the currently active desktop with live status.

commands.name: reload-labels
commands.title: Reload Space Labels
commands.description: Force reload all space label overlay windows.

commands.name: toggle-active-label-window-visibility
commands.title: Toggle Visible Label Window
commands.description: Show/hide the Active Label Window from the desktop.

commands.name: list-windows
commands.title: List Windows
commands.description: List all windows grouped by desktop space and switch to one

commands.name: move-window
commands.title: Move Window
commands.description: List all desktops and move the active window to one

commands.name: switch-to-desktop
commands.title: Switch Desktop
commands.description: List all desktops and switch to one

commands.name: batch-move-windows
commands.title: Batch Move Windows
commands.description: Queue multiple window moves and execute them efficiently

preferences.name: returnToOriginalSpace
preferences.title: Return to Original Space
preferences.label: Enable automatic return
preferences.description: Automatically return to your original desktop after moving windows to a different desktop.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
